dotnet-ai.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-ai
dotnet-ai.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository working with AI, ML, or MCP workloads.

dotnet-aspnet.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-aspnet
dotnet-aspnet.compatibility: Requires an ASP.NET Core project or solution.

dotnet-data.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-data
dotnet-data.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository using Entity Framework Core or similar data-access patterns.

dotnet-diag.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-diag
dotnet-diag.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository, build artifacts, traces, dumps, or a runnable app for diagnostics work.

dotnet-experimental.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-experimental
dotnet-experimental.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository where experimental upstream dotnet/skills guidance is acceptable.

dotnet-maui.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-maui
dotnet-maui.compatibility: Requires a .NET MAUI project or solution.

dotnet-msbuild.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-msbuild
dotnet-msbuild.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository with MSBuild project or solution files.

dotnet-nuget.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-nuget
dotnet-nuget.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository using NuGet package management.

dotnet-template-engine.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-template-engine
dotnet-template-engine.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository using dotnet new templates or template authoring workflows.

dotnet-test.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-test
dotnet-test.compatibility: Requires a .NET test project or solution.

dotnet-upgrade.title: Official .NET skills: dotnet-upgrade
dotnet-upgrade.compatibility: Requires a .NET repository being migrated across framework, SDK, or compatibility changes.
